2026-04-03.summary: Built ghostlab system from scratch. Ran optimization loop on 6/7 passive modules. Found and fixed URL doubling (all 4 modules), article counting (M16), careers page selection (M17), IR Blaster false positive (M18), MSW encoding headers (M04 replay). M16 got 4 iterations: Q4 CMS API integration for external newsroom article counts (ryder.com: 8 → 1,418).
